cc:Work.dc:title: Tray - SlantedTray
cc:Work.dc:description:
One row tray with high back wall and low front wall
Can be used as a display or for cards or gaming tokens. Lay on the side to get piles to draw from. ![Example Use](static/samples/SlantedTray-2.jpg)
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes SlantedTray --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --sx=67:30:30:30:67 --y=40.0 --h=40.0 --outside=0 --front_height=0.3 --thickness=3.0 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=0.5 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes SlantedTray --sx=67:30:30:30:67 --spacing=0.5 Url: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/SlantedTray?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&sx=67%3A30%3A30%3A30%3A67&y=40.0&h=40.0&outside=0&front_height=0.3&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=en&render=2 Url short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/SlantedTray?sx=67%3A30%3A30%3A30%3A67&spacing=0.5 SettingsUrl: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/SlantedTray?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&sx=67%3A30%3A30%3A30%3A67&y=40.0&h=40.0&outside=0&front_height=0.3&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=en&render=2 SettingsUrl short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/SlantedTray?sx=67%3A30%3A30%3A30%3A67&spacing=0.5
